name: Latitude20 Wine Cellar and Wine Bar
summary: Wine cellar and wine bar at La Cite du Vin with a broad global bottle selection and easier logistics than a formal tasting.
whyItMatters: A flexible Bordeaux stop: it can be a casual glass, bottle shopping, or a backup if the museum ticket timing does not work.
pros: Official page describes more than 14,000 bottles and 500 wines from more than 35 countries.
Official page says access to the wine bar, snack bar, and wine cellar is free and open to all.
Official page lists the wine cellar address and contact details.
cons: More global wine selection than Bordeaux-only focus.
Located by La Cite du Vin, not in the historic center.

logistics.opening_hours: Wine cellar: Mon-Fri 10:00-18:30, Sat-Sun 10:00-19:30 per official page; La Cite info page lists related wine bar 15:00-19:00 on opening days.
logistics.reservation_needed: Not clearly required for the cellar; verify if planning a personalized tasting.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Unknown until Bordeaux viewing point is selected.
logistics.transit: Use La Cite du Vin tram access; official La Cite page says tram line B stop La Cite du Vin.
logistics.parking: Paid parking nearby per La Cite du Vin access page, but transit preferred.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Verify Stage 7 Bordeaux access before using this on Fri Jul 10, 2026.

timing.best_visit_window: Afternoon, especially as a lighter alternative to a full museum visit.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium on Bordeaux finish day due to transit and road closure uncertainty.

sources.title: La Cite du Vin - Latitude20 wine cellar
sources.note: Supports concept, bottle count, countries represented, address, access-to-all statement, and cellar opening hours.

sources.title: La Cite du Vin - Opening hours, access and prices
sources.note: Supports La Cite access details and related Latitude20 wine bar hours.

open_questions: Confirm whether the planner wants Latitude20 as a separate candidate from La Cite du Vin or merged as an add-on.
Verify July 2026 race-week opening if Bordeaux publishes special notices.
